case_title: GUBKIN, PETER VS DE WOLF REALTY COMPANY, INC.

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SIGNED SENT TO ARRON SINEL, AGT FOR SERVICE DEWOLF REALTY CO.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GUBKIN, PETER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DE WOLF REALTY COMPANY, INC. $992.50 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,032.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT DE WOLF REALTY COMPANY, INC. HEARING SET FOR JAN-12-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF JAN-12-2007, GRANTED
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION ***-**-****, CONTINUED BY COURT TO FEB-09-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DE WOLF REALTY COMPANY, INC. DISMISS WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GUBKIN, PETER HEARING SET FOR APR-03-2007 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF APR-03-2007, GRANTED
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION ***-**-****, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUN-01-2007 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 CONTINUED TO 6/1/07 AT 10:00 A.M. FOR NEW TRIAL.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GUBKIN, PETER IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DE WOLF REALTY COMPANY, INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $992.50 FILED BY GUBKIN, PETER AS TO DEFENDANT DE WOLF REALTY COMPANY, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-15-2006 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
